title: FullBright+ | 1.21-26.1
description: This Pack Makes Minecraft Fully Bright
body:
---
![fullbright+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d4ebfca4cfb0b97e810ca79d8f5b703ed8e275b.png)

---

> ​A lightweight and vanilla-friendly resource pack designed to banish the gloom and keep your world consistently bright.

---

## ✨ Features

- 🌙 **True Full Brightness**  
  No more dark caves or night shadows—everything stays clearly visible.

- 🍃 **Vanilla-Friendly**  
  Keeps the original Minecraft textures untouched.

- 🔗 **High Compatibility**  
  Works with Vanilla, OptiFine, and Sodium (with PolyTone).

- ⚡ **Lightweight & Smooth**  
  No FPS drops, no heavy shaders—runs great on all devices.

- 🧭 **Better Exploration**  
  Mine, build, and explore freely without worrying about darkness.

---

## 🌸 Why Choose FullBright+?

FullBright+ is perfect for players who want **simple, bright, and distraction-free gameplay**.

- Build anytime without lighting issues  
- Explore caves and dimensions with ease  
- Enjoy a clean and comfortable Minecraft experience  

It’s the ideal balance between **visibility and vanilla gameplay**.

---

## 🛠 Installation Guide

1. Download the **FullBright+** `.zip` file  
2. Move it to your **resource packs folder**  
3. Open Minecraft → **Settings → Resource Packs**  
4. Activate **FullBright+**  

**For Sodium users:** Install **PolyTone** for full compatibility.

---
